cert_index.description: Index of the certificate within the proposal transaction.

governance_description.description: An object describing the content of this GovActionProposal in a readable way.

deposit.description: The deposit amount paid for this proposal.

return_address.description: Bech32 stake address of the reward address to receive the deposit when it is repaid.

ratified_epoch.description: The epoch at which the proposal was ratified. Null if the proposal has not been ratified.

enacted_epoch.description: The epoch at which the proposal was enacted. Null if the proposal has not been enacted.

dropped_epoch.description: The epoch at which the proposal was dropped. A proposal is dropped if it expires or if any of its dependencies expire.

expired_epoch.description: The epoch at which the proposal expired. Null if the proposal has not expired.

expiration.description: The epoch at which this governance action will expire.
